positive: A whimsical celestial garden scene, featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna set among gentle, stylized constellations. The main subject is a cluster of stylized, floating crescent moons and glowing nebula structures, intermingled with oversized, exotic leaves and delicate geometric crystalline elements. The style is highly detailed, modern magical realism, evoking deep blues, vibrant cyan, electric magenta, and soft emerald green. Composition should be centrally balanced, suitable for a repeating, high-contrast textile print. Lighting must be dramatic, coming from the glowing elements themselves (self-illumination), creating strong rim lighting and deep, saturated shadows. Focus on clean silhouettes and smooth, seamless transitions for apparel printing. Vector art quality, high resolution, sticker design.
